# BookedFox
> Online booking and business software for home-service providers.

## Product
- Website: https://bookedfox.com
- Category: BusinessApplication / field service scheduling
- Audience: cleaning, lawn care, handyman, plumbing, HVAC, painting, pressure washing, pet care, car wash, roofing

## Summary
Online booking and business software for home-service providers — scheduling, customers, team, and payments in one place.

## FAQ
https://bookedfox.com/#faq

## Contact
hello@bookedfox.com

## Do not crawl
/app/
/crew/
/api/
/book/
/my/
/sign-in
/sign-up
/auth/
